mapper.sql: id, project_id, username, domain, variable, label, type, length, significant_digits, controlled_terms_or_format, cdisc_submission_value, decimal_places, origin, source, role, cdisc_notes, core, codelist, assigned_value, common, format, comment, developer_notes, supp, qeval, mandatory, key_sequence, controlled_terms, derivation, predecessor, has_no_data, text_content, method, pages, question_text, prompt, dataset_class, structure, sort_order, created_time, updated_time, created_by, updated_by
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sas_project_spec ( project_id, username, domain, variable, label, type, length, significant_digits, controlled_terms_or_format, cdisc_submission_value, decimal_places, origin, source, role, cdisc_notes, core, codelist, assigned_value, common, format, comment, developer_notes, supp, qeval, mandatory, key_sequence, controlled_terms, derivation, predecessor, has_no_data, text_content, method, pages, question_text, prompt, dataset_class, structure, sort_order, created_time, updated_time, created_by, updated_by ) VALUES ( #{projectId}, #{username}, #{domain}, #{variable}, #{label}, #{type}, #{length}, #{significantDigits}, #{controlledTermsOrFormat}, #{cdiscSubmissionValue}, #{decimalPlaces}, #{origin}, #{source}, #{role}, #{cdiscNotes}, #{core}, #{codelist}, #{assignedValue}, #{common}, #{format}, #{comment}, #{developerNotes}, #{supp}, #{qeval}, #{mandatory}, #{keySequence}, #{controlledTerms}, #{derivation}, #{predecessor}, #{hasNoData}, #{textContent}, #{method}, #{pages}, #{questionText}, #{prompt}, #{datasetClass}, #{structure}, #{sortOrder}, #{createdTime}, #{updatedTime}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy} )

INSERT INTO sas_project_spec ( project_id, username, domain, variable, label, type, length, significant_digits, controlled_terms_or_format, cdisc_submission_value, decimal_places, origin, source, role, cdisc_notes, core, codelist, assigned_value, common, format, comment, developer_notes, supp, qeval, mandatory, key_sequence, controlled_terms, derivation, predecessor, has_no_data, text_content, method, pages, question_text, prompt, dataset_class, structure, sort_order, created_time, updated_time, created_by, updated_by ) VALUES
( #{item.projectId}, #{item.username}, #{item.domain}, #{item.variable}, #{item.label}, #{item.type}, #{item.length}, #{item.significantDigits}, #{item.controlledTermsOrFormat}, #{item.cdiscSubmissionValue}, #{item.decimalPlaces}, #{item.origin}, #{item.source}, #{item.role}, #{item.cdiscNotes}, #{item.core}, #{item.codelist}, #{item.assignedValue}, #{item.common}, #{item.format}, #{item.comment}, #{item.developerNotes}, #{item.supp}, #{item.qeval}, #{item.mandatory}, #{item.keySequence}, #{item.controlledTerms}, #{item.derivation}, #{item.predecessor}, #{item.hasNoData}, #{item.textContent}, #{item.method}, #{item.pages}, #{item.questionText}, #{item.prompt}, #{item.datasetClass}, #{item.structure}, #{item.sortOrder}, #{item.createdTime}, #{item.updatedTime}, #{item.createdBy}, #{item.updatedBy} )
mapper.update: UPDATE sas_project_spec SET project_id = #{projectId}, domain = #{domain}, variable = #{variable}, label = #{label}, type = #{type}, length = #{length}, significant_digits = #{significantDigits}, controlled_terms_or_format = #{controlledTermsOrFormat}, cdisc_submission_value = #{cdiscSubmissionValue}, decimal_places = #{decimalPlaces}, origin = #{origin}, source = #{source}, role = #{role}, cdisc_notes = #{cdiscNotes}, core = #{core}, codelist = #{codelist}, assigned_value = #{assignedValue}, common = #{common}, format = #{format}, comment = #{comment}, developer_notes = #{developerNotes}, supp = #{supp}, qeval = #{qeval}, mandatory = #{mandatory}, key_sequence = #{keySequence}, controlled_terms = #{controlledTerms}, derivation = #{derivation}, predecessor = #{predecessor}, has_no_data = #{hasNoData}, text_content = #{textContent}, method = #{method}, pages = #{pages}, question_text = #{questionText}, prompt = #{prompt}, dataset_class = #{datasetClass}, structure = #{structure}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, updated_time = #{updatedTime}, updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM sas_project_spec WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND username = #{username}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sas_project_spec WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND username = #{username} ORDER BY domain ASC, sort_order ASC
SELECT FROM sas_project_spec WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND domain = #{domain} AND username = #{username} ORDER BY sort_order, variable
SELECT DISTINCT domain FROM sas_project_spec WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND username = #{username} ORDER BY domain

SELECT domain, COUNT(*) as variable_count, COUNT(CASE WHEN core = 'Req' THEN 1 END) as required_count, COUNT(CASE WHEN core = 'Exp' THEN 1 END) as expected_count, COUNT(CASE WHEN core = 'Perm' THEN 1 END) as permissible_count, MIN(created_time) as first_created, MAX(updated_time) as last_updated FROM sas_project_spec WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND username = #{username} GROUP BY domain ORDER BY domain

SELECT DISTINCT cl.vcd as vcdName, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT ps.domain ORDER BY ps.domain) as domains FROM sas_codelist_data cl LEFT JOIN sas_project_spec ps ON ps.codelist = cl.vcd
AND (cl.project_id = #{projectId} OR cl.project_id IS NULL) AND (ps.project_id = #{projectId} OR ps.project_id IS NULL)
AND (cl.username = #{username} OR cl.username IS NULL) AND (ps.username = #{username} OR ps.username IS NULL)
AND cl.vcd IS NOT NULL AND cl.vcd != ''
GROUP BY cl.vcd ORDER BY cl.vcd
